mapper.update:
update commodity
commodity_name = #{commodityName},
commodity_price = #{commodityPrice},
commodity_discounted_price = #{commodityDiscountedPrice},
category_id = #{categoryId},
oversold_configurations = #{oversoldConfigurations},
oversold = #{oversold},
inventory = #{inventory},
alarm_threshold = #{alarmThreshold},
dest = #{dest},
server_names = #{serverNames},
bandwidth = #{bandwidth},
business_suitable = #{businessSuitable},
`description` = #{description},
is_deleted = #{isDeleted},
available_status = #{availableStatus},
update_user = #{updateUser},
update_time = #{updateTime},
where id = #{id} and is_deleted = 0
mapper.select: select c.id, commodity_name, commodity_price, commodity_discounted_price, category_id, oversold_configurations, alarm_threshold, description, category,bandwidth, c.status, c.available_status,business_suitable, if(oversold=oversold_configurations,0,1) as hasStock,dest,server_names, (select count(1) from `order` o join order_commodity oc on o.id = oc.order_id where o.is_deleted = 0 and oc.is_deleted = 0 and o.status = 'WAIT_ALLOCATION_RESOURCES' and oc.commodity_id = c.id) as oversold, (select count(1) from server_resources where commodity_id = c.id and is_deleted = 0 and sales_status = 'NOT_SALE' and resources_status = 'NORMAL' and available_status = 1) as inventory, (select count(1) from server_resources where commodity_id=c.id and is_deleted = 0) as resourceNum, cc.category_name as category from commodity c left join commodity_category cc on c.category_id = cc.id where c.id = #{id} and c.is_deleted = 0 and cc.is_deleted = 0

select id, commodity_name, commodity_price, commodity_discounted_price, category_id, oversold_configurations, oversold, inventory, alarm_threshold, description, category, is_deleted, status, available_status, create_user, update_user, create_time, update_time from commodity where id = #{id} and is_deleted = 0 and available_status = 1

select c.id, commodity_name, commodity_price, commodity_discounted_price, category_id, oversold_configurations, oversold, inventory, alarm_threshold, c.description, category, c.is_deleted, c.status, available_status,dest,server_names from `order` o left join order_commodity oo on o.id=oo.order_id left join commodity c on oo.commodity_id=c.id where o.id = #{orderId} and c.is_deleted = 0

select distinct category_id from commodity where category_id in
#{item}

select sc.id as shoppingCartId, c.id as commodityId, c.commodity_name as commodityName, sc.commodity_num as commodityNum, c.commodity_discounted_price as commodityDiscountPrice, c.commodity_price as commodityPrice, cc.category_name as commodityCategoryName, cc.id as commodityCategoryId, IF(c.oversold_configurations = c.oversold, 'true', 'false') as isNoStock, IF(sc.commodity_num > c.oversold_configurations+c.inventory-c.oversold, 'true', 'false') as isBuyNumMoreThanStockNum from shopping_cart sc inner join commodity c on sc.commodity_id = c.id inner join commodity_category cc on c.category_id = cc.id where sc.user_id = #{userId} and c.available_status = 1 and sc.id in
#{item}

select id, commodity_name, commodity_price, commodity_discounted_price, category_id, description, category, status, available_status, (select count(1) from `order` o join order_commodity oc on o.id = oc.order_id where o.is_deleted = 0 and oc.is_deleted = 0 and o.status = 'WAIT_ALLOCATION_RESOURCES' and oc.commodity_id = commodity.id) as oversold, (select count(1) from server_resources where commodity_id = commodity.id and is_deleted = 0 and sales_status = 'NOT_SALE' and resources_status = 'NORMAL' and available_status = 1) as inventory, if(oversold=oversold_configurations,0,1) as hasStock, business_suitable as businessSuitable, bandwidth from commodity where 1 = 1 and is_deleted = 0 and available_status = 1
and category_id = #{dto.categoryId}

select category_name as commodityCategory, commodity_name as commodityName, description as commodityDescription, if(commodity_discounted_price is not null,commodity_discounted_price,commodity_price) as commodityPrice, cc.id as commodityCategoryId, category_name as commodityCategory, cc.summary as commodityCategorySummary, c.available_status as availableStatus from commodity c left join commodity_category cc on c.category_id=cc.id where c.id = #{id} and c.is_deleted = 0
select commodity_name from server_resources sr left join commodity c on sr.commodity_id = c.id where c.is_deleted=0 and sr.id=#{resourcesId}

select c.id,commodity_name, commodity_price, commodity_discounted_price, category_id, oversold_configurations, oversold, inventory, alarm_threshold, description, category,dest,server_names from commodity c join server_resources sr on sr.commodity_id=c.id where c.is_deleted=0 and sr.is_deleted=0 and sr.id=#{resourcesId}

select commodity_name, description as commodityDesc, bandwidth, business_suitable as businessSuitable, cc.category_name, cc.summary as categoryDesc, cc.id as categoryId, c.id as commodityId from commodity c join commodity_category cc on c.category_id=cc.id where c.id=#{commodityId} and c.is_deleted=0

select id, commodity_name, commodity_price, commodity_discounted_price, category_id, description, category, status, available_status, (select count(1) from `order` o join order_commodity oc on o.id = oc.order_id where o.is_deleted = 0 and oc.is_deleted = 0 and o.status = 'WAIT_ALLOCATION_RESOURCES' and oc.commodity_id = commodity.id) as oversold, (select count(1) from server_resources where commodity_id = commodity.id and is_deleted = 0 and sales_status = 'NOT_SALE' and resources_status = 'NORMAL' and available_status = 1) as inventory, if(oversold=oversold_configurations,0,1) as hasStock, business_suitable as businessSuitable, bandwidth from commodity where id = #{id} and is_deleted = 0

select id, commodity_name, commodity_price, commodity_discounted_price, category_id, oversold_configurations, alarm_threshold, description,update_user, create_time, update_time, category, is_deleted, status, available_status, create_user, (select count(1) from `order` o join order_commodity oc on o.id = oc.order_id where o.is_deleted = 0 and oc.is_deleted = 0 and o.status = 'WAIT_ALLOCATION_RESOURCES' and oc.commodity_id = commodity.id) as oversold, (select count(1) from server_resources where commodity_id = commodity.id and is_deleted = 0 and sales_status = 'NOT_SALE' and resources_status = 'NORMAL' and available_status = 1) as inventory from commodity where id = #{id} and is_deleted = 0 and available_status = 1 for update
mapper.insert: insert into commodity(id,commodity_name, commodity_price, commodity_discounted_price, category_id, oversold_configurations, oversold, inventory, alarm_threshold, description, category, is_deleted, status, available_status,dest,server_names, create_user, update_user, create_time, update_time) values (#{id},#{commodityName}, #{commodityPrice}, #{commodityDiscountedPrice}, #{categoryId}, #{oversoldConfigurations}, #{oversold}, #{inventory}, #{alarmThreshold}, #{description}, #{category}, #{isDeleted}, #{status}, #{availableStatus},#{dest},#{serverNames}, #{createUser}, #{updateUser}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})

insert into commodity(id,commodity_name, commodity_price, commodity_discounted_price, category_id, oversold_configurations, oversold, inventory, alarm_threshold, description, category, is_deleted, status, available_status,dest,server_names, create_user, update_user, create_time, update_time) values
(#{entity.id},#{entity.commodityName}, #{entity.commodityPrice}, #{entity.commodityDiscountedPrice}, #{entity.categoryId}, #{entity.oversoldConfigurations}, #{entity.oversold}, #{entity.inventory}, #{entity.alarmThreshold}, #{entity.description}, #{entity.category}, #{entity.isDeleted}, #{entity.status}, #{entity.availableStatus}, #{entity.availableStatus},#{entity.dest}, #{entity.createUser}, #{entity.updateUser}, #{entity.createTime}, #{entity.updateTime})

insert into commodity(id,commodity_name, commodity_price, commodity_discounted_price, category_id, oversold_configurations, oversold, inventory, alarm_threshold, description, category, is_deleted, status, available_status, create_user, update_user, create_time, update_time) values
(#{entity.id},#{entity.commodityName}, #{entity.commodityPrice}, #{entity.commodityDiscountedPrice}, #{entity.categoryId}, #{entity.oversoldConfigurations}, #{entity.oversold}, #{entity.inventory}, #{entity.alarmThreshold}, #{entity.description}, #{entity.category}, #{entity.isDeleted}, #{entity.status}, #{entity.availableStatus}, #{entity.createUser}, #{entity.updateUser}, #{entity.createTime}, #{entity.updateTime})
on duplicate key update commodity_name = values(commodity_name), commodity_price = values(commodity_price), commodity_discounted_price = values(commodity_discounted_price), category_id = values(category_id), oversold_configurations = values(oversold_configurations), oversold = values(oversold), inventory = values(inventory), alarm_threshold = values(alarm_threshold), description = values(description), category = values(category), is_deleted = values(is_deleted), status = values(status), available_status = values(available_status), create_user = values(create_user), update_user = values(update_user), create_time = values(create_time), update_time = values(update_time)
